notes: Boundary case exercising a read-only diagnostic task with profiling commands. A performance regression in db/query.ts must be analyzed before any fix; the request explicitly forbids modification until profiling data is collected. Contract must set task_type repo_map (the closest available read-only type for diagnostic work), max_files_to_modify 0, include commands[] showing how to run the profiler (node --prof server.js), set output_format json with artifact_path .laguna/profile-summary.json, and configure acceptance checks validating the artifact exists and contains expected profiling data. Tests the read-only contract path with diagnostic commands in context_packet, parallel to the existing log_reduction read-only case. Synthetic fixture; no customer data. Generated case.
